goal: Get the duplicate charge on O1011 resolved.
success_criteria: Agent explains auth-hold vs settled charge, never asks for card numbers/CVV, and opens a billing ticket once you confirm both are settled.

customer_msg: I just checked my card and I was charged TWICE for order O1011. Fix this please. maya.fernandes@example.com.
agent_msg: Hi Maya, I can look into that for you. To verify your identity, may I confirm your email address is maya.fernandes@example.com?

customer_msg: Yes, that's correct. I just want this duplicate charge fixed.
agent_msg: Thanks for your patience, Maya. I see your order: one Strata Overshirt for $95.00, placed on June 30th. Banks sometimes place a temporary hold alongside the actual charge. The hold usually drops off in 3–5 business days and won’t be billed. Do both charges on your statement say they’ve posted/settled, or is one still pending?

tool_call_details.name: get_order
tool_call_details.result: {"order_id": "O1011", "customer_id": "C001", "order_date": "2026-06-30", "status": "processing", "carrier": null, "tracking_no": null, "ship_address": "102 Fernandes St, Springfield, IL", "expected_delivery": "2026-07-06", "delivered_date": null, "total": 95.0, "customer_name": "Maya Fernandes", "customer_email": "maya.fernandes@example.com", "customer_phone": "+1-555-0101", "loyalty_tier": "Gold", "items": [{"product_id": "P020", "name": "Strata Overshirt", "size": "M", "color": "Ochre", "qty": 1, "unit_price": 95.0, "final_sale": 0}], "today": "2026-07-04"}

customer_msg: No, both say "posted." I don't want to wait for some hold to drop off. I want the duplicate charge removed.
agent_msg: I’ve created a priority support ticket about the duplicate charge for your order. Our team will look into this and reach out within one business day. Is there anything else I can help with while you wait?

tool_call_details.name: create_ticket
tool_call_details.arguments: {"customer_id": "C001", "vertical": "V4", "summary": "Customer Maya Fernandes (maya.fernandes@example.com) reports two settled charges for order O1011. Both charges are posted; temporary hold explanation did not resolve the issue. Order total: $95.00, placed 2024-06-30.", "priority": "priority"}
tool_call_details.result: {"ok": true, "ticket_id": 1, "priority": "priority", "note": "human team responds 9am-6pm ET Mon-Fri; outside hours this is a callback ticket"}
